blockers.command: cd api && npm test && cd app && npm test
cd api && npx tsc --noEmit && cd app && npx tsc --noEmit

blockers.description: Invariant enforced client-side only — not on server
athleteId accepted as URL parameter or request body field
Fastify server created in beforeEach instead of beforeAll
New behaviour exists with no test coverage
Acceptance criterion in spec has no corresponding test
Something listed as non-goal in spec has been implemented

changes_required.description: Feature component or module placed in wrong folder
TODO or FIXME comment left in implementation
changes_required.fix: Remove comment or create follow-up roadmap task
Add CONTRACT: DATA_OWNERSHIP or CONTRACT: AUTH_IDENTITY comment

changes_required.description: Non-standard or incorrect HTTP status code used
Raw database error or stack trace returned to client
changes_required.fix: Catch error, log internally, return structured { error, message }
Add authentication guard to route definition

changes_required.description: Frontend component infers server state from local logic
changes_required.fix: Derive all state from server response

changes_required.description: Feature re-implements a shared UI primitive
changes_required.fix: Use existing shared component from common UI layer

warnings.description: Error caught but not logged before re-throw or swallow
TypeScript any type used without comment justification
warnings.fix: Add inline comment explaining why any is necessary here

status_definitions.APPROVED: All checks pass, ready to merge
status_definitions.CHANGES_REQUIRED: Non-blocking issues found, must be resolved before merge
status_definitions.BLOCKED: Constitutional violation found, cannot merge until resolved
